seoTitle: South Johnstone vs South Kolan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Johnstone and South Kolan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Johnstone vs South Kolan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Johnstone and South Kolan.
heading: South Johnstone vs South Kolan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Johnstone, Queensland and South Kolan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Kolan has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to South Johnstone (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Johnstone or South Kolan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Johnstone has a flood risk score of 46/100, while South Kolan scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Johnstone scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. South Kolan scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Johnstone or South Kolan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Kolan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
